graphEvents.summary: kasper_improve exposes dry_run and forwards it to executeKasperImprove
slash parser and improve handler render normal output and return before queue mutation when dryRun is set
mode routing treats flags as workflow inputs but does not list dry-run
pre-iteration gate, prompt rendering, executor dispatch, validation, and reducer refresh are the core dry-run boundary
convergence CLI emits decision/signals/blockers and only persists snapshots when requested
fan-out runner builds lineage prompts and commands before spawning subprocesses
Add dry-run as a first-class workflow input rather than a new mode
Render the real prompt and executor plan before returning without dispatch
Skip validation, reducer, state, and audit writes in dry-run because no iteration ran
Preview convergence decision/signals/blockers through read-only convergence output
Fan-out dry-run should return lineage prompt/command plans without child processes

summary: Thread dry-run as a first-class command/tool input, not a separate workflow mode.
why: Keeps :auto/:confirm routing intact while allowing operators to preview the resolved loop.

summary: Reuse the real planning/rendering path, then return before dispatch.
why: Shows the exact iteration prompt and executor command without spending executor budget.

summary: Make the dry-run side-effect boundary explicit and testable.
why: Prevents preview output from creating state that later masquerades as executed evidence.

summary: Render convergence as a read-only preview section.
why: Gives the operator a would-stop/would-continue explanation with real graph signals and no snapshot write.

summary: Extend dry-run through fan-out by returning lineage command plans before spawning subprocesses.
why: Loop-wide preview must include multi-executor lineage prompts, commands, sandbox, and model choices.

summary: Prior artifact search found the S5-02 registry question but no prior dry-run finding, so this iteration is net-new for the segment.
evidence: .opencode/specs/deep-loops/030-agent-loops-improved/001-reference-research/research/findings-registry.json:310-311; rg result for iterations/deltas contained no dry-run finding.

summary: kasper returns before pending-queue writes; deep research should return before executor dispatch and reducer-owned state writes.
